project.name: understand-anything-py
project.description: understand-anything-py: 53 files (50 code, 2 docs, 1 config). Primary languages: ada, c, cobol, cpp, csharp.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: understand-anything-py — turn any codebase into an interactive knowledge-graph HTML file.

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Analysis pipeline: deterministic structural extraction + optional LLM enrichment.

nodes.name: resolve
nodes.summary: Return a list of project-internal target file rel-paths imported by this file.

nodes.name: layers.py
nodes.summary: Architectural layer detection via community detection (Louvain) over the file graph.

nodes.name: enrich
nodes.summary: Fill in better summaries for file-level nodes. Returns number of summaries updated.

nodes.name: name_layers
nodes.summary: Improve layer names/descriptions from member files. Mutates layers; returns count updated.

nodes.name: narrate_tour
nodes.summary: Rewrite tour step titles/descriptions into a narrative. Mutates tour; returns count.

nodes.name: _first_doc_comment
nodes.summary: Heuristic one-line summary from the head of a file.

nodes.name: _python_extract
nodes.summary: Return (module_doc, symbols, imports). symbols: list of dicts; imports: list[_PyImport].

nodes.name: _ModuleIndex
nodes.summary: Maps dotted module names (and suffixes) to Python file node ids.

nodes.name: extract_symbols
nodes.summary: Return list of {kind, name, methods, doc} or None if extraction is unavailable.

nodes.name: _extract_generic
nodes.summary: Paradigm-agnostic flat extraction for languages without an explicit spec.

nodes.name: treesitter.py
nodes.summary: Multi-language symbol extraction via tree-sitter (optional `[treesitter]` extra).

nodes.name: fingerprint.py
nodes.summary: Per-file content fingerprints for incremental re-analysis.

nodes.name: _normalize_layers
nodes.summary: Cap layer count, fold small communities into a 'Shared' layer, guarantee full coverage.

nodes.name: graph.py
nodes.summary: Orchestrates the full analysis pipeline into a KnowledgeGraph.

nodes.name: compute_layout
nodes.summary: node_ids: list[str]; edges: list[(src, tgt, weight)]; layer_of: dict[id->layer_key].

nodes.name: __init__.py
nodes.summary: Rendering: turn a KnowledgeGraph into a single self-contained HTML file.

nodes.name: static.py
nodes.summary: Zero-JavaScript static renderer: inline SVG embedded in HTML. Just a picture, no interactivity.

nodes.name: template.py
nodes.summary: Self-contained interactive HTML template (vanilla canvas renderer, inlined data + JS).

nodes.name: scan.py
nodes.summary: Project scanner: discover files, detect language/category, count lines, sniff frameworks.

nodes.name: schema.py
nodes.summary: Data model for the knowledge graph.

nodes.name: test_smoke.py
nodes.summary: Smoke tests: schema round-trip, multi-language extraction, and rendering.

tour.title: Project Overview
tour.description: Start with the project's documentation to understand its purpose.

tour.title: Shared / Misc
tour.description: The Shared / Misc layer centers on `tests/fixtures/legacy/widget.dart`. Dart source file (6 lines).

tour.title: Understand Anything
tour.description: The Understand Anything layer centers on `src/understand_anything/schema.py`. Data model for the knowledge graph.

tour.title: Analyze
tour.description: The Analyze layer centers on `src/understand_anything/analyze/treesitter.py`. Multi-language symbol extraction via tree-sitter (optional `[treesitter]` extra).

tour.title: Python
tour.description: The Python layer centers on `tests/test_smoke.py`. Smoke tests: schema round-trip, multi-language extraction, and rendering.

tour.title: Imports
tour.description: The Imports layer centers on `tests/fixtures/imports/Main.java`. Java source file (5 lines).

tour.title: Tests
tour.description: The Tests layer centers on `tests/fixtures/imports/app.cpp`. Cpp source file (3 lines).

tour.title: Multilang
tour.description: The Multilang layer centers on `tests/fixtures/multilang/app.js`. Javascript source file (10 lines).

tour.title: Rust
tour.description: The Rust layer centers on `tests/fixtures/imports/main.rs`. Rust source file (6 lines).
